title: nephrodium labrusca
intro: Nephrodium labrusca, also known as the Lady's fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). The medicinal properties of Nephrodium labrusca include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of using Nephrodium labrusca include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium labrusca can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
